title: Auto Walk Forward
description: Cobblemon Rides Compatible ! Adds two keybinds that allows you to toggle auto move forward.
body:
Toggles auto-walk forward.

"Non Simulated" keybind will simply add values to Input Movement forward.   
"Simulated" Will simulate forward button press. 
Works with Cobblemon Fly, Swim, and Works while Inventory is open. (Recommended)

*Playing in server is untested and may lead to a ban!*


Auto Move forward, Auto Walk forward
